summary: Comprehensive testing of Competitor Store Spy feature complete. All 12 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with all sections working correctly. Surface scan is PUBLIC (no auth), Deep Analysis requires auth and uses GPT-5.2.
seed_data_creation: None - uses live Shopify store data (gymshark.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Competitor Spy feature fully tested. Surface scan at POST /api/competitor-spy/scan is PUBLIC (no auth required) - returns product_count, pricing, revenue_estimate, threat level, categories, best_sellers, newest_products. Deep analysis at POST /api/competitor-spy/deep-analysis requires auth and uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key - returns AI insights with strengths, weaknesses, how_to_compete, opportunity_score. Frontend at /competitor-spy has dark theme (bg-[#09090b]), search input, and displays all scan results. Nav link added to LandingLayout.

PASS - Returns success:true with product_count:250, store_size:Large, pricing, revenue_estimate, velocity, threat:Medium, categories, best_sellers, newest_products
test_results.POST /api/competitor-spy/scan (https://g: PASS - Works with full URL prefix
test_results.POST /api/competitor-spy/scan (missing U: PASS - Returns 400 for missing URL field
test_results.POST /api/competitor-spy/deep-analysis (: PASS - Returns AI analysis with strengths, weaknesses, how_to_compete, opportunity_score

ui_tests.Competitor Spy Page Load: PASS - Dark theme (bg-[#09090b]), 'Spy on any Shopify competitor' heading
ui_tests.Scan Results - Stats: PASS - Products (250), Avg Price ($45.59), Est. Revenue ($5,699-34,196), Velocity (Moderate)
ui_tests.Scan Results - Categories: PASS - Shows 10 categories with counts and progress bars
ui_tests.Scan Results - Best Sellers: PASS - Shows 5 products with images, prices, variants
ui_tests.Scan Results - Newest Additions: PASS - Shows 5 newest products with 'days ago' timestamps
ui_tests.Deep Analysis CTA: PASS - data-testid='spy-deep-cta' shows 'Sign Up to Unlock' for unauthenticated users

features_verified: Surface Scan (PUBLIC) - Scrapes Shopify /products.json, returns comprehensive store analysis
Deep Analysis (PREMIUM) - Uses GPT-5.2 for AI-powered competitive insights
Threat Level Assessment - High/Medium/Low based on store size, activity, pricing
Revenue Estimation - Rough monthly revenue range based on catalog and pricing
Product Velocity - Tracks new products added in 7/30 days
Category Breakdown - Top 10 categories with counts and percentages
Pricing Strategy Detection - Identifies pricing approach (premium, budget, wide range)
Best Sellers Detection - Products with most variants (likely best sellers)
Newest Products - Recently added products with timestamps

mocked_apis.AI/LLM: LIVE - Uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key for deep analysis
mocked_apis.Shopify Scraping: LIVE - Scrapes real Shopify stores via /products.json endpoint

notes: Deep analysis endpoint takes ~10-15 seconds due to GPT-5.2 API call. Surface scan is fast (~5-8 seconds) as it only scrapes /products.json. Some transient 403 errors observed in logs for analytics batch endpoint but not affecting core functionality.
